title: arctotis laciniata
intro: Arctotis laciniata, also known as the Leopard's Ear or African Daisy, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Arctotis laciniata include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Arctotis laciniata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in creams and ointments for topical application.
